upasargachandrika.example_text: 'SAligrAmABiDAne BagavataH kzetre kaYcitkAlamatipAlayAmi' (pra0 ca0 5) atipAlayAmi gamayAmi nayAmi kzapayAmi
'hitvA tvadarSanaM kiYcid viGnaM na pratipAlayet' (BA0 SAM0 3607) pratipAlayet prApnuyAt tvaddarSanaM hitvA tava darSanaM vinA
'arizwaM gacCa panTAnaM putrAnme pratipAlaya' (BA0 u0 13724) pratipAlaya pAhi rakza avekzasva
'abrAhmaRasya pranazwasvAmikaM rikTaM saMvatsaraM paripAlya rAjA haret' (bO0 Da0 1101816) paripAlya rakzitvA niDApya
